expand_windows.description: Window labels (W1, W2...) to expand UI trees for. Focused window is auto-expanded.

expand_data.description: Request full data. ref: 'cycle_N_typed', 'cycle_N_actor', 'clipboard', 'run_history'. range: [start_pct, end_pct] 0-100. Data arrives next cycle in EXPANDED DATA section.

done_so_far.description: Factual progress: which phases are done, what failed, what remains. Produce at least 150 tokens of analysis.

next_step.description: Specific next instruction for actor. Name element types/roles to find (not IDs), text to type, or keys to press. If stuck, diagnose and suggest different approach. Produce at least 150 tokens.
